title: Colored Name Teams
description: Change the color of your name in vanilla minecraft with this datapack!
body:
Have you wanted to personalise urself more in a vanilla enviroment?
look no further. With this datapack you can very simply change name color with /trigger commands
to match ur swag. Enjoy - sacdj

**New project using this pack!:** [CW - Cosmetic Waypoints](https://modrinth.com/project/jWS4RkWh)
